title: asian friend groups
snippet: asian-american friend groups... sigh... i'm exhausted from these bubbles

title: SALOTTO, my dream space
snippet: i visited the Salotto space today to attend a talk by Giorgia Lupi. i found the concept of the space so inspiring. to my understanding, it's a coworking space shared by a few small design firms and hosts events.

title: rich people don't have sauce
snippet: a wise man once said, "rich people don't have sauce." "...so they buy sauce from other people", in the form of art, clothing, music, and other materialistic pursuits.

title: conceptual art and god
snippet: i was lost until i discovered God and conceptual art

title: life as performance art
snippet: a thought i had: what is stopping us from treating our entire lives as a big performance art? fear? of what? of not being well-received? of totally casting away societal norms?

title: everything is easier when you're healthy
file: everything is easier when you're healthy.md
snippet: uhhhh, no brainer here. but i find it really true, especially now that i'm being more intentional about prioritizing my health this year.

title: we've reached a peak in hyperrealistic AI
file: we've reached a peak in hyperrealistic AI.md
snippet: we've reached a peak in hyperrealistic AI images... now it's time to take steps backwards. it's interesting how intentionally "crunching down" the quality of images/videos shot on modern cameras has become a trendy aesthetic.

title: emergence and spontaneity in picking a movie
file: emergence and spontaneity in picking a movie.md
snippet: chris is my mom's good friend and housemate. he's a (horror) movie enthusiast, and over the past few years has become an unlikely friend of mine too. he watches at least 1 movie a day.

title: too much self-analysis is not good, working on the edge of your abilities
file: too much self-analysis is not good, working on the edge of your abilities.md
snippet: this is more of a self-reminder. i may be self-analyzing right now, just as i have been for the past 2 posts and the past several weeks. i have a habit of mistaking worry for a problem that needs immediate solving through analysis.

title: where the hell did the time go?
file: where the hell did the time go?.md
snippet: it's already december 11, the last day of classes of my first semester of grad school. where did the time go?

title: things to live for
snippet: endorphins from movement: exercise, dance. endorphins from spending time with loved ones. exploring: beautiful nature, art, music, history of our world.

title: on naps
snippet: when you know in your heart that you're going to take a nap later in the day, it makes it a lot easier to wake up in the morning. maybe what america needs is more siesta time.

title: faith in humanity is gradually going up
file: faith in humanity is gradually going up.md
snippet: grateful to have met new friends at the art exhibition opening who touched me with their positive energy and warm invitation into their circle. grateful for friends of various levels of closeness accepting my invitation to see the electronics showcase.

title: eating me alive, positive signals
snippet: i have a project idea that i'm calling "Big Nose" for now… every day that i'm not moving it forward feels like it's eating me alive. i question why i'm still entertaining these other commitments.

title: reminder of a pro tip: just get started
file: reminder of a pro tip: just get started.md
snippet: i found it daunting to be assigned a 3-hour Unity tutorial for my Hypercinema class. i wrote down on my to-do list to just get started with 30 minutes of it.

title: theatre kids' party
snippet: on halloween this year, i went to a party thrown by people who would typically be labeled as "theatre kids". i am writing to report that as adults, theatre kids seem to have the most fun.

title: "when life gives you tangerines"
snippet: this show made me believe in love again. it's broken and mended my heart over and over again.

title: bangs
snippet: are a lot harder to manage than they let on. a decent-looking fringe can require daily washing, a hair dryer, a hair roller, hair oil, and a straightener. all of that work just for it to get split apart by the wind.

title: nighttime routines, rituals, time
snippet: i tracked that i spent almost 2 hours on my full night routine tonight… went on a short run, took a shower, flossed, put on hasan minhaj's podcast, brushed my teeth, did my skincare, blow dried my hair.

title: times when i feel the most present
file: times when i feel the most present.md
snippet: present: working with woodworking tools. listening to the hum and feeling the vibrations of the machinery makes me feel like i'm really there. driving. immersing myself into a good movie.

title: thinking about where to go with this blog
file: thinking about where to go with this blog.md
snippet: I actually started this blog in October 2024. Since then, I have yet to make a single post. The short answer as to why is because I've been scared… to put my own thoughts out in public.

title: finally, a first post
snippet: I actually started this blog in October 2024. Since then, I have yet to make a single post, besides updating my "about" and "now" pages every few months.
